notes.synthetic_odds_basis: Odds are approximated from probabilities with margin-adjusted implied probability.
notes.staking_warning: Staking plan distributes risk but does not guarantee profit.

staking_plan.notes: Singles carry most of the bankroll. Accumulators are capped at 1 EUR each and kept to 2 EUR total. System bets are limited to 1 EUR total. Excluded fixtures are those without a qualifying market at or above the minimum confidence threshold.

singles.reason: Best low-variance angle available; both the model probability and available market support under 2.5 goals.
Strongest confidence among the listed low-risk markets; away side also has a usable X2 option, but under 2.5 is the safer single.
Home side favored and the market probability supports a controlled-scoring match.
Balanced matchup with away side protection and a solid historical edge in the head-to-head.
High over-2.5 environment in the data, but the listed under 2.5 market still clears the confidence threshold and offers a lower-variance angle.

accumulators.name: acca_3_803_1087_754
accumulators.reason: Three-leg conservative accumulator built from the strongest low-variance selections with qualifying confidence and odds within the allowed range.

accumulators.name: acca_3_803_1087_822
accumulators.reason: Keeps the same core low-risk legs while swapping in a second-chance away protection pick to diversify the slip slightly.

system_bets.reason: Small speculative system position to reduce variance versus a straight accumulator while keeping exposure limited to the best qualifying low-risk legs.

excluded_fixtures.reason: No available market meets the minimum confidence threshold.
